---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# Omer Tzuk, Ph.D.
**Physicist | Data Scientist | Researcher**

**Contact Information**

* **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/omer-tzuk/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/omer-tzuk/)


---

## Summary
Ph.D. in Physics of Complex Systems with expertise in developing algorithms for numerical analysis and mathematical modeling of physical systems. Over 12 years of experience in Python, data science, and machine learning, with a specialized focus on complex networks, knowledge graphs, and machine learning on graphs. Additional experience with retrieval augmented generation, large language models, and transformers. Currently conducting EEG research on consciousness and predictive processing.

---

## Education

**Ph.D. in Physics of Complex Systems** | 2014 – 2019
*Ben-Gurion University of the Negev, Israel*

* **Research:** Dynamics of spatial pattern formation in complex systems.
* **Key Contributions:** Developed algorithms for multidimensional stability analysis and numerical continuation; built Python codes for mathematical modeling and network-based population structure inference.

**M.Sc. in Astrophysics** | 2012 – 2014
*University of Amsterdam, The Netherlands*

* **Track:** Gravitation and Astro-particle Physics excellence track.
* **Key Contributions:** Wrote Python algorithms for Bayesian inference and Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods regarding dark matter interactions in the early universe.

**B.Sc. in Astronomy and Astrophysics** | 2008 – 2011
*University of Bologna, Italy*

* Graduated with honors (con lode).

---

## Professional Experience

**Postdoctoral Researcher** | Oct 2025 – Present
*University of Haifa*

* Researcher at the Contemplative Neuroscience and Neurophenomenology Lab.
* Conducting EEG data collection and analysis for studies on anxiety, altered states of consciousness, and predictive processing.
* Named collaborator on NIH grant application.

**LLM Engineer & Graph RAG Systems Architect** | Dec 2024 – Sep 2025
*BetterYou*

* Led R&D of knowledge graphs and graph machine learning for a psychophysiological AI assistant.

**Researcher** | Jul 2024 – Oct 2024
*LAMBDA Lab, Tel Aviv University*

* Optimized Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines from Knowledge Graphs in collaboration with Alpha10X.

**VP R&D** | 2022 – Mar 2024
*We-Agri Ltd.*

* Developed a carbon sequestration platform using LLMs and Knowledge Graphs.
* Built geochemical simulation models in Python for soil organic carbon dynamics.

**Researcher** | 2022 – Jul 2022
*DAOstack Ltd.*

* Developed smart contracts for on-chain parametric insurance products using Solidity on Ethereum.

**Postdoctoral Researcher** | 2019 – 2020
*Tel-Aviv University*

* Built Python code to simulate large-scale hybrid epidemiological models on networks.

**Research Assistant** | 2013
*CERN, Geneva, Switzerland*

* Developed a Bayesian inference tool in C++ (ROOT) for big data at the LHCb experiment.

---

## Publications

* **Can Spatial Self-Organization Inhibit Evolutionary Adaptation?** (2025)
    Bera, B. K., Tzuk, O., Bennett, J. J. R., et al. *Journal of The Royal Society Interface*, 22(222). [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1098/rsif.2024.0454)
* **Dryland Mechanisms Could Widely Control Ecosystem Functioning in a Drier and Warmer World** (2022)
    Grünzweig, J. M., et al. *Nat Ecol Evol*, 6(8), 1064–1076. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-022-01779-y)
* **Linking Spatial Self-Organization to Community Assembly and Biodiversity** (2021)
    Bera, B. K., Tzuk, O., Bennett, J. J., and Meron, E. *eLife*, 10. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.7554/eLife.73819)
* **The Role of Spatial Self-Organization in the Design of Agroforestry Systems** (2020)
    Tzuk, O., Uecker, H., and Meron, E. *PLOS ONE*, 15(7). [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0236325)
* **Period Doubling as an Indicator for Ecosystem Sensitivity to Climate Extremes** (2019)
    Tzuk, O., et al. *Scientific Reports*, 9(1), 19577. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-019-56080-z)
* **Interplay between Exogenous and Endogenous Factors in Seasonal Vegetation Oscillations** (2019)
    Tzuk, O., et al. *Scientific Reports*, 9(1), 354. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-018-36898-9)
* **Front Instabilities Can Reverse Desertification** (2019)
    Fernandez-Oto, C., Tzuk, O., and Meron, E. *Phys. Rev. Lett.*, 122(4). [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevLett.122.048101)
* **Continuum Modeling of Discrete Plant Communities** (2019)
    Meron, E., et al. *Mathematics*, 7(10). [DOI](https://doi.org/10.3390/math7100987)
* **Wavelength Selection beyond Turing** (2017)
    Zelnik, Y. R. and Tzuk, O. *Eur. Phys. J. Spec. Top.*, 226(9). [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1140/epjst/e2017-70034-x)
* **Discovery of Fairy Circles in Australia Supports Self-Organization Theory** (2016)
    Getzin, S., et al. *Proc Natl Acad Sci USA*, 113(13). [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.1522130113)

---

## Teaching Experience

* **Lecturer** | 2020 – Oct 2024
    *Tel-Aviv University and Afeka College of Engineering*
    Operations research, stochastic processes, data mining, ML, and business analytics.
* **Lecturer** | 2019 – Present
    *Open University, Israel*
    Physics courses and introduction to astronomy.
* **Teaching Assistant** | 2014 – 2019
    *Ben-Gurion University of the Negev*
    Mathematical Methods, Quantum Physics, and fundamental physics.

---

## Community Leadership

* **Co-Founder & Chair** | 2023 – Present
    *Spirit Tech Hub Israel*
    Convening stakeholders around technologies for mental well-being and contemplative science.
* **Co-Founder & Chief Editor** | 2014 – 2019
    *humanist.co.il*
    An online magazine and community hub for the secular humanist community in Israel.

---

## Continuing Education

* **Blue Sky Leaders Certificate Program** | 2026
    *California Institute of Integral Studies (CIIS)*
    Conscious Leadership, systems thinking, and regenerative design.
* **Facilitators of Dialogue Training Course** | 2025
    *The School for Peace (SFP)*
    Training in facilitation of Jewish-Arab dialogue and conflict transformation.

---

## Skills

* **Core:** Algorithm development, numerical analysis, mathematical modeling, data science, complex networks, graph ML, graph databases, EEG pipelines.
* **Software:** Python, MATLAB, Pandas, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Neo4j, MNE-Python, EEGLAB.
* **Languages:** Hebrew (Native), English (Fluent), Italian (Fluent).
